products.name: NSP-2
products.descriptor: Ku-band multimode SAR/MTI radar for Group 1-2 UAS, under 3.5 lbs

evidence.snippet:
NSP-2
=====
The NSP-2 is the most accessible entry point for airborne radar, designed for Group 1-2 UAS where every ounce matters. Weighing less than 3.5 lbs, it allows small tactical drones to see through weather and darkness to detect hidden targets that optical sensors miss.

products.name: NSP-3
products.descriptor: Combat-proven Ku-band multimode SAR/MTI radar for Group 2-3 UAS, under 6 lbs

evidence.snippet:
NSP-3
=====
The NSP-3 is the combat-proven industry standard for Group 2-3 UAS. With a low power consumption and a compact footprint, it delivers reliable multi-mode operation for ground and maritime missions without compromising platform endurance or displacing EO/IR payloads.

products.name: NSP-5
products.descriptor: Ku-band multimode SAR/MTI radar for Group 3-4 UAS, 16.5 lbs single-pod

evidence.snippet:
NSP-5
=====
Designed for UAS platforms with greater payload capacity, the NSP-5 leverages increased transmit power and a larger aperture to extend operational range. It offers enhanced wide-area search and tracking performance, providing a step up in capability for missions requiring deep coverage and precision tracking in complex environments.

Ku-band, multi-channel, airborne multimode radar
16.5 lbs typical, 130-190W Configuration Dependent

products.descriptor: Ku-band multimode airborne radar for Group 4-5 UAS and manned aircraft

products.name: Lisa 3D™
products.descriptor: Unified C2 and PED software platform for IMSAR radar systems

evidence.snippet:
Lisa 3D: Command, Control, and Exploitation
===========================================
Lisa 3D™ is the unified Command and Control (C2) and Processing, Exploitation, and Dissemination (PED) platform for IMSAR radars. Acting as the bridge between the operator and the sensors, it visualizes the imagery generated by the processing server and provides a single, intuitive map-based environment for mission management.

products.name: Lisa Ground Expeditionary (LGE)
products.descriptor: Self-contained ruggedized transit-case ground kit for tactical UAS datalink operations

evidence.snippet:
### Lisa Ground Expeditionary (LGE):
The Complete Tactical UAS Ground Kit

products.name: Lisa Air Max
products.descriptor: 1U 18-inch rackmount 28VDC processing server for manned aircraft ISR missions

evidence.snippet:
### Lisa Air Max: Standard Rackmount Processing
The Lisa Air Max is a 1U, 18-inch deep rackmount server built for manned aircraft with standard 19-inch rack infrastructure. Operating on 28VDC, it makes onboard ISR missions possible, processing high-resolution imagery and tracks for immediate viewing on a cabin-mounted mission computer.

products.name: Lisa Ground Max
products.descriptor: AC-powered 1U rackmount processing server for GCS, mobile command vehicles, and shipboard use

evidence.snippet: ### Lisa Ground Max: Fixed-Site & Maritime Rackmount Processing

The Ground Max is an AC-powered 1U rackmount server optimized for UAS Ground Control Stations (GCS), mobile command vehicles, or shipboard environments. It is designed for installations where a rack-mounted solution is required to process raw data downlinked from the aircraft, serving finalized products to a separate mission computer for visualization and analysis.

products.name: Lisa Air Lite
products.descriptor: Compact modular 28VDC processing server for manned aircraft with non-standard rack space

evidence.snippet:
### Lisa Air Lite: Alternative Form Factor Processing
For manned aircraft where standard rack space is limited or unavailable, the Lisa Air Lite provides identical processing capabilities in a modular, compact form factor. This 28VDC server is designed for flexible installation in non-standard equipment bays while maintaining the high-speed data processing required for real-time missions.
